CustomField.description: Total number of HCPs to be provided with Educational Support by Viatris (if a group of HCPs are to be provided with Educational Support for the same educational event).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total number of HCPs to be provided with Educational Support by Viatris (if a group of HCPs are to be provided with Educational Support for the same educational event).
CustomField.label: Total number of HCPs to be provided
